query: INSERT INTO achievements (name, description, badgeIcon, pointsReward) VALUES ('First Lesson', 'Complete your first lesson', '🎓', 10), ('Lesson Streak', 'Complete lessons on 7 consecutive days', '🔥', 50), ('Practice Master', 'Complete 5 practice tests', '📚', 100), ('Perfect Score', 'Score 100% on a practice test', '⭐', 150), ('Course Completer', 'Complete an entire GED course', '🏆', 200), ('Knowledge Seeker', 'Complete 50 lessons', '🧠', 75), ('Test Taker', 'Complete your first practice test', '✅', 25), ('Study Buddy', 'Refer a friend who completes a course', '👥', 125);
